footer.tagline: Your neighborhood marketplace. Connecting local sellers with buyers for fresher products, faster delivery, and stronger communities.
footer.allRightsReserved: People Tech Ventures. All rights reserved.

home.splitBuyDesc: Discover local shops, order products, book services — all delivered to your doorstep.
home.splitSellDesc: Create your digital store for free, manage orders, and grow your business online.
home.buyerHeroDesc: Discover nearby stores, order fresh produce, book home services, and get everything delivered to your doorstep — all from one app.
home.sellerHeroDesc: Create your free digital store in 5 minutes. Manage orders, track analytics, and reach more customers — zero commission, forever free.
home.howItWorksBuyerSubtitle: Three easy steps to start shopping from local sellers near you.
home.howItWorksSellerSubtitle: Three easy steps to get your store online and start selling.
home.buyerFeaturesSubtitle: Padose is packed with features to make local shopping seamless and delightful.
home.sellerFeaturesSubtitle: Go beyond listing products. Get real intelligence and tools to outperform the competition.
home.sellerPowerToolsSubtitle: Real intelligence and professional web presence to grow your business faster.
home.storeDnaDesc: Like a fitness score for your store. See how you rank against peers in your community across 7 dimensions — sales, engagement, catalog quality, reviews, conversion, responsiveness, and content.
home.storeDnaFeature3: Actionable tips for every weak area
home.storeWebsiteDesc: Every seller gets a free, professional website at yourstore.padose.com. Share it on WhatsApp, Instagram, or print it on your business card.
home.storeWebsiteFeature3: No app needed for buyers to browse
home.catalogDesc: Two powerful ways to build your product catalog — zero forms, zero friction. Use the in-app AI chatbot or our Telegram bot.
home.whatsappStoreDesc: Open your store in 30 seconds flat — no app download, no website. Just send a WhatsApp message to our bot.
home.exploreCategoriesSubtitle: From fresh vegetables to home services, discover a wide range of products and services available in your neighborhood.
home.communityTitle: Empowering Local Communities, One Transaction at a Time
home.communityDesc: Padose is more than a marketplace. It's a movement to support local vendors, reduce food waste, and strengthen neighborhood bonds. When you shop on Padose, you're investing in your community.
home.communityBenefit1: Support local livelihoods and small businesses
home.communityBenefit2: Get fresher products with shorter supply chains
home.communityBenefit3: Reduce food waste with local, seasonal produce
home.communityBenefit4: Build trust with vendors you see every day
home.whatSellersSaySubtitle: Real, unedited messages from sellers on WhatsApp.
home.downloadPadoseDesc: Your neighborhood marketplace is just one tap away. Start discovering local products and services now.
home.readyToGrowDesc: Join 260+ sellers who are reaching more customers, managing orders effortlessly, and growing their income with Padose.
home.activityBuyer: Someone in {{city}} just installed the Padose app - {{time}}m ago
home.activitySeller: A new seller in {{city}} just joined Padose - {{time}}m ago

homeSteps.buyerStep1Desc: Find local vendors, shops, and service providers right in your neighborhood
homeSteps.buyerStep2Desc: Browse products, book services, and add to cart from multiple stores
homeSteps.buyerStep3Desc: Track your order in real-time and receive it at your doorstep
homeSteps.sellerStep1Desc: Set up your digital storefront with products, services, and custom branding
homeSteps.sellerStep2Desc: Handle orders, inventory, scheduling, and customer conversations
homeSteps.sellerStep3Desc: Track analytics, boost visibility, and reach more customers daily

homeHighlights.smartDiscoveryDesc: Find products and services by category, location, or keyword search
homeHighlights.serviceBookingDesc: Book appointments with time slot selection and availability tracking
homeHighlights.multiStoreCartDesc: Shop from multiple sellers in a single checkout experience
homeHighlights.orderTrackingDesc: Real-time status updates from placement to delivery
homeHighlights.chatWithSellersDesc: Direct messaging for queries, negotiations, and custom orders
homeHighlights.pulseVideoFeedDesc: Watch short videos from sellers showcasing their products
homeHighlights.wishlistFollowsDesc: Save favorite items and follow your preferred stores
homeHighlights.reviewsRatingsDesc: Read and write honest reviews to help the community
homeHighlights.storeCustomizationDesc: Logo, banner, colors, business hours, policies — make it yours
homeHighlights.catalogManagementDesc: Products and services with variants, images, videos, and discounts
homeHighlights.aiProductListingDesc: Describe your product in chat and AI creates the full listing for you
homeHighlights.analyticsDashboardDesc: Revenue, engagement, popular items, and customer insights at a glance

homeSellerFeatures.orderManagementDesc: Track, update, and fulfill orders with invoice generation
homeSellerFeatures.schedulingDesc: Weekly hours, blocked dates, and course/workshop curriculum
homeSellerFeatures.paymentSetupDesc: UPI, payment gateways, and ad-hoc payment links
homeSellerFeatures.customerInboxDesc: Respond to inquiries, negotiate deals, and build relationships
homeSellerFeatures.pulseVideoDesc: Short-form videos to showcase products and reach new customers
homeSellerFeatures.reviewsReputationDesc: Customer reviews, star ratings, and reputation analytics
homeSellerFeatures.offersPromotionsDesc: Time-limited discounts, featured products, and seasonal deals
homeSellerFeatures.storeDnaDesc: Your performance score vs peers — 7 dimensions, color-coded grades, and tips
homeSellerFeatures.storeWebsiteDesc: Free website at yourstore.padose.com — buyers browse without installing an app

forBuyers.heroDesc: Discover products and services from trusted vendors in your neighborhood. From fresh produce to home services — everything you need is just around the corner.
forBuyers.journeySubtitle: From discovering local sellers on the web to getting everything delivered via the app — here's how it all comes together.
forBuyers.step1Desc: Visit padose.com to discover local sellers, browse categories, and learn about vendors in your neighborhood.
forBuyers.step2Desc: Get the Padose buyer app from Google Play Store for the full shopping experience with all features.
forBuyers.step3Desc: Browse products, book services, chat with sellers, track orders, and get everything delivered to your doorstep.
forBuyers.featuresSubtitle: Padose is designed to make your local shopping experience seamless, fast, and delightful. Here's how each feature looks in the app.
forBuyers.appPreviewSubtitle: The Padose buyer app puts your entire neighborhood marketplace in your pocket.
forBuyers.ctaDesc: Download the Padose app and discover amazing products and services from your neighborhood.
forBuyers.smartDiscoveryDesc: Browse by category, search by keyword, or explore nearby stores. Our location-based discovery ensures you always find the best products and services around you.
forBuyers.multiStoreShoppingDesc: Add products from multiple sellers into a single cart. Padose handles the complexity so you can shop seamlessly across your neighborhood.
forBuyers.serviceBookingDesc: Book appointments for services like tutoring, beauty treatments, fitness sessions, and more. Select your preferred date, time slot, and service variant.
forBuyers.orderTrackingDesc: From the moment you place an order to delivery, track every step. Get notified when your order is confirmed, shipped, and out for delivery.
forBuyers.chatWithSellersDesc: Have questions? Negotiate a price? Want a custom order? Message sellers directly within the app for instant communication.
forBuyers.pulseVideoFeedDesc: Watch short-form videos from local sellers showcasing their products, recipes, behind-the-scenes, and more. Discover new stores through engaging content.
forBuyers.wishlistFollowDesc: Save products and services you love for later. Follow your favorite stores to get updates whenever they add new items or run promotions.
forBuyers.reviewsRatingsDesc: Read honest reviews from other buyers before making a purchase. Share your experience to help the community make better decisions.
forBuyers.communityMarketplaceDesc: Join your neighborhood community to discover hyper-local sellers. Each community is a curated marketplace tailored to your area.
forBuyers.addressManagementDesc: Save multiple delivery addresses for home, office, or any location. Switch between addresses effortlessly during checkout.

forSellers.heroDesc: Whether you're a street vendor, home baker, tutor, or local shop owner — Padose gives you the tools to reach more customers and grow your income.
forSellers.journeySubtitle: From registering on the website to managing your full digital storefront — here's how you grow with Padose.
forSellers.step1Desc: Visit padose.com and sign up as a seller in under 5 minutes. Or create your store in 30 seconds via our WhatsApp bot — no app needed.
forSellers.step2Desc: Download the seller app, customize your storefront, add products and services, set up payments and scheduling. Or add products instantly via our Telegram bot.
forSellers.step3Desc: Receive orders, chat with customers, track analytics, and grow your business with promotions and community reach.
forSellers.storeDnaIntro1: Inspired by how Lichess Tutor helps chess players discover strengths, Store DNA analyzes your store's performance across 7 dimensions and compares you against peers in your community.
forSellers.storeDnaIntro2: One glanceable score. Color-coded insights. Actionable tips. Know exactly where you shine and where to improve.
forSellers.storeDnaMeasureDesc: We analyze your real data across 7 dimensions — sales, engagement, catalog, reviews, conversion, responsiveness, and content.
forSellers.storeDnaCompareDesc: Your metrics are ranked against all active stores in your community using percentile scoring. No vanity metrics — real peer comparison.
forSellers.storeDnaImproveDesc: Every yellow or red metric comes with an actionable tip. Follow the suggestions and watch your score climb.
forSellers.aiChatbotIntro1: Skip the forms. Just tell our AI chatbot about your product in everyday language — it creates a complete listing in seconds. Title, description, pricing, and category — all done for you.
forSellers.aiChatbotIntro2: Perfect for sellers who want to get their catalog online fast without the hassle of filling out forms.
forSellers.aiChatbotFeature1: Natural language — describe like you'd tell a friend
forSellers.aiChatbotFeature3: Smart categorization — placed in the right category
forSellers.aiChatbotFeature4: Edit before publish — review and tweak before going live
forSellers.telegramIntro1: Already on Telegram? Chat with our bot to list your products — no app download needed. Send a message, photo, or voice note describing what you sell and the bot builds the listing for you.
forSellers.telegramIntro2: Perfect for sellers who prefer WhatsApp-style simplicity. Available 24/7, right inside Telegram.
forSellers.telegramFeature1: No app needed — works entirely inside Telegram
forSellers.telegramFeature2: Send text, photos or voice — describe your product your way
forSellers.telegramFeature3: Instant listings — product goes live on your store immediately
forSellers.telegramFeature4: Manage on the go — update prices and stock anytime
forSellers.whatsappIntro1: No app download, no website visit. Just send a WhatsApp message to our bot and create your store in 30 seconds flat. Search for your community, pick a name, choose a category — done.
forSellers.whatsappIntro2: The fastest way to go digital. Perfect for sellers who live on WhatsApp and want zero friction to get started.
forSellers.whatsappFeature1: 30-second setup — store created in 5 simple messages
forSellers.whatsappFeature2: No app needed — works entirely inside WhatsApp
forSellers.whatsappFeature3: Community search — find and join your local marketplace
forSellers.whatsappFeature4: Instant activation — your store goes live immediately
forSellers.voiceIntro1: No typing, no forms. Just speak — in Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, Kannada, or English — and our AI creates the listing instantly. Perfect for sellers who prefer speaking over typing.
forSellers.voiceIntro2: Works right inside the Telegram bot. Send a quick voice note describing your product and price. That's it — it's live on your store in seconds.
forSellers.voiceFeature1: 5 languages — Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, Kannada, English
forSellers.voiceFeature2: Hands-free listing — no typing or form filling
forSellers.voiceFeature3: Understands context — product name, quantity, price from speech
forSellers.voiceFeature4: Instant publish — live on your store in under 10 seconds
forSellers.storeWebsiteDesc: Every Padose seller gets a free, professional website at yourstore.padose.com. Buyers can browse your catalog, view prices, and place orders — no app install needed.
forSellers.storeWebsiteFeature5: Mobile optimized — looks great on any device
forSellers.storeWebsiteFeature6: Zero setup — auto-generated from your seller app
forSellers.featuresSubtitle: From product listing to payment collection — everything you need to run your business professionally.
forSellers.appPreviewSubtitle: The Padose seller app gives you a complete business management toolkit right on your phone.
forSellers.ctaDesc: Register now and create your digital store in just 5 minutes. No fees, no commission, no hassle.
forSellers.digitalStorefrontDesc: Create a professional online store with custom branding — logo, banner, accent color, tagline, and business hours. Your store, your identity.
forSellers.productCatalogDesc: List unlimited products with multiple images, videos, variants (sizes, colors), pricing, and discount configuration. Manage everything from your phone.
forSellers.serviceManagementDesc: Offer services like tutoring, beauty, fitness, and more. Set up time slots, manage capacity, and even create courses with curriculum and schedules.
forSellers.analyticsDashboardDesc: Track your business performance with real-time insights — revenue, orders, engagement metrics, popular items, and customer behavior analytics.
forSellers.orderManagementDesc: Manage incoming orders with status tracking. Update orders from new to confirmed, shipped, and delivered. Generate professional invoices.
forSellers.schedulingAvailabilityDesc: Set your weekly operating hours, block specific dates, and manage service availability. Perfect for service providers with fixed schedules.
forSellers.paymentIntegrationDesc: Accept payments via UPI, payment gateways, or create custom payment links. Set up your preferred payment method and start collecting.
forSellers.customerMessagingDesc: Communicate directly with buyers through an integrated inbox. Answer queries, negotiate deals, and build lasting customer relationships.
forSellers.inventoryManagementDesc: Track stock levels across all your product variants. Toggle availability instantly and never oversell with real-time inventory sync.
forSellers.communityReachDesc: List your store in multiple community marketplaces to reach more customers. Get discovered by buyers in different neighborhoods.
forSellers.pulseVideoFeedDesc: Create short-form videos showcasing your products, behind-the-scenes moments, or customer testimonials. Reach more buyers through engaging video content on the Pulse feed.
forSellers.reviewsReputationDesc: Build trust with verified customer reviews and ratings. Track your store reputation, respond to feedback, and let your happy customers bring you more business.
forSellers.offersPromotionsDesc: Create time-limited discounts, featured product promotions, and special deals to attract more buyers. Set expiry dates and track how your offers perform.
forSellers.benefit5Min: Quick setup — start selling in minutes
forSellers.benefit247: Your store is always open online
